title: Le Réveil
description: Quite Frankly, Sickles with custom abilities.
body:
# Le Réveil.
**This mod adds a bunch of stuff (mostly related to the SMP it was made for) that can help you with a few tasks!**



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The _Geode Detector_ in game called _Geode Essence Widener_ when held and right clicked on a block will tell you if there is a chance of a Geode being there.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Now for the main part of the mod: Sickles with each custom abilities


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Sturdy Sickle

"A tool also very handy for mashing anything in your path of cultivation."

- On right click: Replenishes 50% of lost health, cooldown of 1 minute.
- On entity/block hit: Pulls the entity down to the ground, being submerged with their feet one block down.
- Extra notes: Has 0.5 more attack speed and 2 more attack damage..

Nymph Sickle

"A tool crafted by forest Nymphs helping you in all your farming needs."

- On right click: When a crop is right clicked, it and nearby crops will be broken and harvested.
- On entity/block hit: No use.
- Extra notes: None.

Warped Sickle

"A tool capable of bringing the master's soul along when thrown."

- On right click: Used similar to an enderpearl.
- On entity/block hit: No use.
- Extra notes: The sickle will still damage you similar to an ender pearl and can even summon Endermite.

Crimson Sickle

"A tool forged in the depths of literal hell, still hot and fresh for use."

- On right click: Summons a small fireball that has a short range and a lot of affected gravity.
- On entity/block hit: Puts the entity on fire.
- Extra notes: Looking up when firing a fireball is adviced, otherwise the ball will go straight down at your feet. (This will be fixed in the future)

 

Sickle Upgrade Template

- This item is used together with a netherite ingot in a crafting table to create the Sturdy Sickle.

</details>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The crops include:
- Strawberries.
- Suspicious Leaves, which grant speed when consumed.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Extras:

- Cakes can be crafted into 9 cake slices and vice versa.
- Cake slices surrounded by Suspicious Leaves make Suspicious cake slices which can grant Night vision or severe Nausea when consumed.
- Copper and Terbysium nuggets can be crafted from their respective ingot, and are throwable.
- Speaking about Terbysium, it's a new resource crafted using two pieces of raw copper, and is used in a few recipes.
- Cake Blocks are made by crafting together nine cakes in a crafting table, and can be infinitely right clicked to regain stamina
- Suspicious Cake Blocks do not have a use yet, but are pretty. (Their use will eventually be for a villager job POI)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


That was practically all! If you have any issues feel free to post them at the [issue tracker](https://github.com/TywrapStudios/awakening-of-reveil/issues) or just [join my Discord server.](https://discord.gg/kcm8scfCwK) Have a nice day!

Alternatively, my mod is also on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/le-reveil).

> This mod is no longer being developed. I decided I don't want to work on it anymore, so be it. I _might_ make it open source at some point but who knows.

> **You may use this in your modpacks**
